---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start server with `./zepto_server --port 8123`
2. Run query: `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Amazon Linux 2023, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Architecture: [e.g., x86_64, aarch64/Graviton]
- ZeptoDB version/commit: [e.g., `main@abc1234`]
- Build type: [Release/Debug]

## Additional Context

Logs, screenshots, benchmark numbers, etc.
